name: Cinnabon Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl combine water, yeast and sugar. Stir until dissolved.
2. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, prepare the pudding mix according to package directions. Add margarine, eggs and salt. Mix well.
4. Gradually add yeast mixture. Blend in flour; knead until smooth. Place in a greased bowl. Cover and let rise until doubled.
5. Punch down dough and let rise again.
6. Roll out on a floured board to 3 1/2 x 21-inch size.
7. Spread 1 cup softened butter over the surface.
8. In a small bowl, mix 2 cups brown sugar and 4 teaspoons cinnamon. Sprinkle over top.
9. Roll up tightly. Make notches every 2 inches.
10. Cut each roll into pieces about 2 inches apart on a lightly greased cookie sheet.
11. Press down lightly on each roll.
12. Cover and let rise until doubled again.
13. Bake at 350 degrees F for 15-20 minutes, or until golden.
14. Frost warm rolls with Cream Cheese Frosting.
Cream Cheese Frosting:
Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix until smooth. Makes about 20 very large rolls.
